creator: vikashb@where-ever.za.net
text:
latest portsnap fetch => ~ 13h00 UTC

root@fossil:/usr/ports/devel/bugzilla50 # portsnap fetch update
Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 6 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from ec2-sa-east-1.portsnap.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching snapshot metadata... done.
Updating from Thu Apr 16 13:49:56 SAST 2020 to Thu Apr 16 15:26:37 SAST 2020.

root@fossil:/usr/ports/devel/bugzilla50 # make checksum
===>  License MPL20 accepted by the user
===>   bugzilla50-5.0.4_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/bugzilla.
=> Attempting to fetch https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/webtools/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz
fetch: https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/webtools/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 3994094, actual 5736607
=> Attempting to fetch https://archive.mozilla.org/pub/webtools/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz
fetch: https://archive.mozilla.org/pub/webtools/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 3994094, actual 5736607
=> Attempting to fetch https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/webtools/archived/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz
fetch: https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/webtools/archived/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch https://archive.mozilla.org/pub/webtools/archived/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz
fetch: https://archive.mozilla.org/pub/webtools/archived/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/bugzilla/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/bugzilla/bugzilla-5.0.4.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/bugzilla and try again.
*** Error code 1
